name: Xiao Qiao

skills.name: Encouraging Thoughts
skills.description: Hitting enemies with skills enhances herself, increasing her Movement Speed.

skills.name: Blossoming Fan
skills.description: Throws fan in the target direction, which returns to her upon reaching max range, damaging enemies in its path both ways.

skills.name: Honeysweet Breeze
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in the target area and launches them.

skills.name: Meteor Storm
skills.description: Summons meteors, dealing damage to nearby enemies in range.

tips: Xiao Qiao (Mage): Tier S on international ranked — 48.6% WR.
Build core: Lightfoot Shoes, Stone of Sorcery, Boots of the Arcane.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 48.6%, pick 1.85%, ban 0.16%, popularity tier S.
Counters Ukyo Tachibana, Han Xin · Weak into Liu Bei, Menki.

faqs.question: Is Xiao Qiao good in current season?
faqs.answer: Xiao Qiao is Tier S Mage with 48.6% win rate, 1.85% pick rate, and 0.16% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Xiao Qiao build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Lightfoot Shoes, Stone of Sorcery, Boots of the Arcane, Venomous Staff, Grand Staff, Void Staff. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Xiao Qiao?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Xiao Qiao: Liu Bei, Menki. Xiao Qiao is strong into Ukyo Tachibana, Han Xin.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Ukyo Tachibana, Han Xin. Countered by: Liu Bei, Menki.
